title: Shadows of Brimstone - Part 20 - The Enemies! - Part 3
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Q1zf4SC-AvQ

Daniel (@dungeondive) wraps the enemy coverage with a final deluxe pack—the Shadow Ninja Clan—and then takes a detour to recommend three ninja films (Ninja in the Dragon's Den, Duel to the Death, and Chang Cheh's Five Element Ninja). The Ninja Clan features acrobatic assassins with shuriken attacks, armour-bypassing strikes, dodge abilities, and a Kosugi Ninja Master whose combat scales with the initiative gap between attacker and target. Six different shadow clans and named leaders ensure variety, while "deadly mission" cards give each encounter a narrative objective—kidnapping, espionage, sabotage, or assassination.

Daniel also shares a practical eBay tip: Kickstarter-sourced enemy packs may have their rulebook pages bound into a single combined book. Buyers must ensure the seller includes those pages—he's had to chase down colour photocopies more than once.

----

The ninja clan operates in shadows and deception. Would you rather face them in the open mines or risk an ambush in the Forbidden Fortress?
